description: A wide, open meadow with knee-high grass. The northern edge is completely open, leading back into the deeper forest. To the east, a rusted iron gate stands alone. To the west, a sturdy wooden door is set into a freestanding stone arch.

edge_n.description: The meadow gives way to the Shoelace Forest clearing to the north.

gate_e.description: A rusted iron gate. Beyond it, you see... nothing but white mist.

gate_w.description: A sturdy wooden door. It leads back to the main forest clearing.

exit_west.description: The path leads back West to the clearing.
